name: Emanation (Cold)
scaffolding_intent: Emits cold/frost particles around the entity

parameters.name: tint
parameters.description: RGB tint shift applied to entity pixels (additive)

parameters.name: tintSaturation
parameters.description: How strongly the tint is applied (0 = no tint, 1 = full tint)

correction_intent: Child described the wrong sensation — the entity actually feels cold, is shivering, or is uncomfortable from temperature
suggestion_intent: Child hasn't expressed that a character feels cold or uncomfortable from temperature
